panels.title: IAQ Index
panels.description: Self-baselined air quality score: 100 = current BME680 gas resistance at or above its own 90th-percentile reading over the last 72h (clean air), dropping toward 0 as resistance falls (more VOCs). Bands: 80-100 Good, 60-80 Moderate, 40-60 Poor, 0-40 Very Poor. Relative to this sensor's own recent history, not an absolute/calibrated scale.

targets.query:
raw = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and r._field == "gas_resistance" and r._value > 0.0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

baseline = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: -72h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and r._field == "gas_resistance" and r._value > 0.0)
  |> group(columns: ["device"])
  |> quantile(q: 0.9)

join(tables: {raw: raw, baseline: baseline}, on: ["device"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      ratio = 100.0 * r._value_raw / r._value_baseline
      score = if ratio > 100.0 then 100.0 else if ratio < 0.0 then 0.0 else ratio
      return {_time: r._time, _value: score, device: r.device}
    })

panels.title: CO2
panels.description: SCD-41 CO2 concentration. Bands: <800ppm Good, 800-1200 Moderate, 1200-2000 Poor, >2000 Very Poor (stuffiness/drowsiness).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Humidity
panels.description: BME680 relative humidity. Bands (EPA/ASHRAE-style comfort/mold-risk guidance): <30% Too Dry, 30-55% Comfortable, 55-60% Borderline, 60-70% Humid (mold risk), >70% Very Humid.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bme_humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Temperature
panels.description: BME680 temperature. Bands are a generic indoor-comfort default (<16C Cold, 16-18C Cool, 18-24C Comfortable, 24-26C Warm, >26C Hot) - adjust to your own preference, this isn't a health/safety threshold like CO2.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bme_temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Dew Point
panels.description: Derived from BME680 temperature + humidity. Rough comfort reference: below 10C dry, 10-16C comfortable, 16-18C somewhat humid, above 18C sticky/condensation risk. Shown without color thresholds - Humidity is the primary comfort signal.

targets.query:
import "math"

data = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bme_temperature" or r._field == "bme_humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

data
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      a = 17.62
      b = 243.12
      alpha = (a * r.bme_temperature) / (b + r.bme_temperature) + math.log(x: r.bme_humidity / 100.0)
      return {_time: r._time, _value: (b * alpha) / (a - alpha), device: r.device}
    })

panels.title: Absolute Humidity
panels.description: Derived from BME680 temperature + humidity. Unlike relative humidity, this tracks actual moisture content independent of temperature swings. Shown without color thresholds - Humidity is the primary comfort signal.

targets.query:
import "math"

data = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bme_temperature" or r._field == "bme_humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

data
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      a = 17.62
      b = 243.12
      es = 6.112 * math.exp(x: (a * r.bme_temperature) / (b + r.bme_temperature))
      e = es * (r.bme_humidity / 100.0)
      return {_time: r._time, _value: 216.7 * (e / (273.15 + r.bme_temperature)), device: r.device}
    })

panels.title: Pressure Trend
panels.description: Latest rate of change of BME680 pressure. Positive = rising, negative = falling. Shown without color thresholds - direction, not magnitude, is what matters here.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1h, nonNegative: false)

panels.title: IAQ Index
panels.description: Self-baselined air quality score - see the stat tile for band definitions.

targets.query:
raw = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and r._field == "gas_resistance" and r._value > 0.0)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

baseline = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: -72h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and r._field == "gas_resistance" and r._value > 0.0)
  |> group(columns: ["device"])
  |> quantile(q: 0.9)

join(tables: {raw: raw, baseline: baseline}, on: ["device"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      ratio = 100.0 * r._value_raw / r._value_baseline
      score = if ratio > 100.0 then 100.0 else if ratio < 0.0 then 0.0 else ratio
      return {_time: r._time, _value: score, device: r.device}
    })

panels.title: Dew Point
panels.description: Derived from BME680 temperature + humidity (Magnus-Tetens formula). Rough comfort reference: below 10C dry, 10-16C comfortable, 16-18C somewhat humid, above 18C sticky/condensation risk.

targets.query:
import "math"

data = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bme_temperature" or r._field == "bme_humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

data
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      a = 17.62
      b = 243.12
      alpha = (a * r.bme_temperature) / (b + r.bme_temperature) + math.log(x: r.bme_humidity / 100.0)
      return {_time: r._time, _value: (b * alpha) / (a - alpha), device: r.device}
    })

panels.title: Absolute Humidity
panels.description: Derived from BME680 temperature + humidity. Unlike relative humidity, this tracks actual moisture content independent of temperature swings.

targets.query:
import "math"

data = from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bme_temperature" or r._field == "bme_humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

data
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      a = 17.62
      b = 243.12
      es = 6.112 * math.exp(x: (a * r.bme_temperature) / (b + r.bme_temperature))
      e = es * (r.bme_humidity / 100.0)
      return {_time: r._time, _value: 216.7 * (e / (273.15 + r.bme_temperature)), device: r.device}
    })

panels.title: Pressure Trend
panels.description: Rate of change of BME680 pressure, smoothed over a window that adapts to the selected time range. Positive = rising pressure, negative = falling. The gray line marks zero.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and r._field == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1h, nonNegative: false)
